spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: Control Room Grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4) with gap-4 or gap-6
spacing_and_layout.marketing_grid: Tetris Grid with wide gaps (gap-8 to gap-12)
spacing_and_layout.container_padding: p-6 md:p-8 for cards, p-12 to p-24 for marketing sections
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-sm (2px) or rounded-md (6px) maximum. Maintain sharp, enterprise feel.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Strictly left-aligned for data and chat. Never center-align paragraphs or dense data.

surfaces_and_micro_themes.dashboard_cards: Flat background (bg-white), 1px subtle border (border-border), no default shadow. On hover: subtle shadow-sm and border color darkens.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.chat_bubbles: User: bg-gray-100 text-gray-900. AI: bg-white text-gray-900 border border-gray-200. Clear visual separation.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.header: Solid background (bg-white) with a hard bottom border. No glassmorphism.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.citations: Small monospaced inline badges. bg-gray-100 border border-gray-300 rounded-sm text-xs px-1 hover:bg-brand-primary hover:text-white transition-colors cursor-pointer.

components_strategy.general: Use Shadcn/UI heavily customized for a flat, high-contrast Swiss aesthetic.
components_strategy.charts: Recharts or Shadcn Charts. Use monochrome palettes with single accent colors (brand primary). Minimal grid lines.
components_strategy.data_tables: Dense, left-aligned, sticky headers. Use hover effects on rows (bg-gray-50).
components_strategy.share_links: Copy to clipboard input fields should have a strong focus ring (ring-2 ring-brand-primary offset-2).
components_strategy.icons: Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) - Duotone or Regular weight for crisp, technical look.

animation_and_motion.chat_streaming: Framer Motion for smooth reveal of markdown chunks.
animation_and_motion.interactions: Hover states must have higher contrast. Buttons scale slightly (active:scale-[0.98]).

hero_background.description: Abstract futuristic architectural details in stark black and white, serving as a structural geometric background for marketing.

feature_structural_image.description: Abstract geometric facade with grey panels, highlighting structured data.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use @phosphor-icons/react for all icons.
Implement 'Cabinet Grotesk' for all headings and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body text via Next.js next/font or standard Google Fonts/Fontshare.
For the marketing page, use the 'Tetris Grid' layout pattern and rely on high contrast black-and-white typography alongside the provided structural images.
In the Chat interface, format the AI responses strictly with markdown and render inline citations as small clickable monospaced badges.
Admin Dashboard must use a dense 'Control Room Grid' with sharp 1px borders everywhere (`border-collapse` style where possible).
Avoid generic Tailwind shadows (shadow-md). Use borders and layout density to establish hierarchy instead.
All interactive elements MUST have `data-testid` attributes.
Use Recharts for the admin analytics visualizations. Ensure charts use the brand primary color against a white background.
